Hi! We're Shanmu. We're a global company
on a mission to cultivate meaningful
relationships that propel international trade forward.

Welcome to the Global Network

At Shanmu, we believe that cultivating meaningful connections across borders is transformative. Seeing the world through diverse perspectives makes us wiser. It opens us up. When we trade, travel, learn, laugh and authentically share with our global partners — we amplify one another.

Trade and Travel, By Experts

We specialize in bespoke international trade and small group tourism for visionaries of all stages. In each of our destinations, we've cultivated relationships with local businesses to create one-of-a-kind, uplifting experiences and strategic exchanges you can't find anywhere else.

WHERE WE GO

Deep connections aren't a tourist attraction.

We're here for all visionaries, who shy away from cookie-cutter imports and tours, and are looking for something truly transformational. They don't want to be treated like mere clients. They want to be treated like a partner. They want to be inspired and energized by the company of other visionaries and meaningful human connections.

SOUND LIKE YOU? THIS WAY.

For me, global trade and travel are the ultimate teachers. I love the way they broaden your perspective — you're exposed to new cultures, markets, people, and ideas. But, I also love what cross-border exchange teaches you about humanity - no matter how different we seem on the surface, we all are really similar at our core. We all want to thrive, connect, and have a voice - that's universal.

— FOUNDER, SHANMU

LET'S
CONNECT
